source_rationale: In the "Glandular-enriched genes" group, we identified a cluster of genes associated with epithelial structure, secretion, and ion transport. This set included DSP (desmoplakin), CDH1 (E-cadherin), GRHL2, and BARX2, which regulate epithelial integrity and branching morphogenesis, as well as several solute carriers (SLC13A2, SLC5A1, SLC15A1) and secretory enzymes (PRSS8, PRSS22, SULT2B1).

In the "Glandular-enriched genes" group, we identified a cluster of genes associated with epithelial structure, secretion, and ion transport. This set included DSP (desmoplakin), CDH1 (E-cadherin), GRHL2, and BARX2, which regulate epithelial integrity and branching morphogenesis, as well as several solute carriers (SLC13A2, SLC5A1, SLC15A1) and secretory enzymes (PRSS8, PRSS22, SULT2B1).
